urgent_methodology: Publisher-marked Breaking, Urgent, Alert, Just in, Developing or similar items are collected first and receive priority over standard items, unless they are liveblogs, programme previews or low-value content.

latest.title: German politician resigns over surrogacy child controversy
latest.summary: Jens Spahn has resigned as the parliamentary group leader of Germany's governing coalition due to accusations of hypocrisy regarding his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, a stance supported by Spahn's Christian Democrat party.
latest.details: Jens Spahn has resigned as the parliamentary group leader of Germany's governing coalition due to accusations of hypocrisy regarding his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, a stance supported by Spahn's Christian Democrat party. Chancellor Friedrich Merz stated that Spahn's decision was 'right' and 'inevitable,' emphasizing the importance of credibility in politics. Alexander Hoffmann is expected to take over Spahn's duties until a successor is appointed.
latest.full_brief: Jens Spahn has resigned as the parliamentary group leader of Germany's governing coalition due to accusations of hypocrisy regarding his use of a surrogate mother. Surrogacy is illegal in Germany, a stance supported by Spahn's Christian Democrat party. Chancellor Friedrich Merz stated that Spahn's decision was 'right' and 'inevitable,' emphasizing the importance of credibility in politics. Alexander Hoffmann is expected to take over Spahn's duties until a successor is appointed.

latest.title: Russian online retail warehouses hit by deadly Ukrainian strikes
latest.summary: Eight people have been killed and 62 injured after Ukrainian drones struck two warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer, Wildberries. The attacks resulted in seven deaths and 25 injuries at a warehouse in Tambov, and one death and 37 injuries at another warehouse in Elektrostal.
latest.details: Eight people have been killed and 62 injured after Ukrainian drones struck two warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer, Wildberries. The attacks resulted in seven deaths and 25 injuries at a warehouse in Tambov, and one death and 37 injuries at another warehouse in Elektrostal. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky stated that the strikes targeted major logistics facilities used for supplying components for drone production. Wildberries is often compared to Amazon and is considered a vital component of Russian logistics.
latest.full_brief: Eight people have been killed and 62 injured after Ukrainian drones struck two warehouses belonging to Russia's biggest online retailer, Wildberries. The attacks resulted in seven deaths and 25 injuries at a warehouse in Tambov, and one death and 37 injuries at another warehouse in Elektrostal. Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelensky stated that the strikes targeted major logistics facilities used for supplying components for drone production. Wildberries is often compared to Amazon and is considered a vital component of Russian logistics.

latest.title: Helicopters dump water as huge Norway fire destroys homes
latest.summary: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo.
latest.details: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo. Firefighters are currently battling the blaze, which has spread to a nearby forest. Local police have stated that the fire is still not under control.
latest.full_brief: A massive fire in Drammen, southern Norway, has destroyed more than 100 homes. Hundreds of residents have been evacuated from the area, which is located about 30 miles west of Oslo. Firefighters are currently battling the blaze, which has spread to a nearby forest. Local police have stated that the fire is still not under control.

latest.title: Indian activist on hunger strike for 20 days forcibly taken to hospital
latest.summary: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP).
latest.details: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.
latest.full_brief: Sonam Wangchuk, a 59-year-old Indian activist, has been on a hunger strike for 20 days in Delhi. He was protesting for educational reforms alongside the Cockroach Janta Party (CJP). Following his removal from the protest site, CJP founder Abhijeet Dipke has begun an indefinite fast in Wangchuk's place. Wangchuk's wife has requested that no medical treatment be administered without her consent.

latest.title: The Guardian’s Carter Sherman fondly remembers being terrified by Ocarina of Time
latest.summary: Carter Sherman has a background in covering sex, gender, and related politics, having previously worked for Vice and other publications. She authored 'The Second Coming: Sex and the Next Generation’s Fight Over Its Future,' which explores the impact of the internet on relationships.
latest.details: Carter Sherman has a background in covering sex, gender, and related politics, having previously worked for Vice and other publications. She authored 'The Second Coming: Sex and the Next Generation’s Fight Over Its Future,' which explores the impact of the internet on relationships. Sherman has received several awards for her journalism, including a Scripps Howard Award. She currently co-hosts a show at The Guardian.
latest.full_brief: Carter Sherman has a background in covering sex, gender, and related politics, having previously worked for Vice and other publications. She authored 'The Second Coming: Sex and the Next Generation’s Fight Over Its Future,' which explores the impact of the internet on relationships. Sherman has received several awards for her journalism, including a Scripps Howard Award. She currently co-hosts a show at The Guardian.

latest.title: Cuba edges toward breakdown as power cuts and US meddling push society to brink
latest.summary: Tensions have increased in Cuba as the US blockade continues. The island has been experiencing a six-month-long oil blockade, which has exacerbated the already fragile state of its infrastructure.
latest.details: Tensions have increased in Cuba as the US blockade continues. The island has been experiencing a six-month-long oil blockade, which has exacerbated the already fragile state of its infrastructure. Blackouts have become a regular part of life, with many citizens expressing their frustration through cacerolazos, or drumming of pots and pans. The Cuban government has stated that it faces a total absence of fuel and lacks access to spare parts for its thermoelectric units.
latest.full_brief: Tensions have increased in Cuba as the US blockade continues. The island has been experiencing a six-month-long oil blockade, which has exacerbated the already fragile state of its infrastructure. Blackouts have become a regular part of life, with many citizens expressing their frustration through cacerolazos, or drumming of pots and pans. The Cuban government has stated that it faces a total absence of fuel and lacks access to spare parts for its thermoelectric units.

latest.title: White House backs Argentina players over Falklands banner in World Cup semi-final
latest.summary: The White House has expressed support for Argentina's footballers who displayed a banner claiming the Falklands Islands after their World Cup semi-final victory. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' reflecting Argentina's stance on the territorial dispute.
latest.details: The White House has expressed support for Argentina's footballers who displayed a banner claiming the Falklands Islands after their World Cup semi-final victory. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' reflecting Argentina's stance on the territorial dispute. Andrew Giuliani, head of the White House Fifa taskforce, emphasized the importance of free speech in the United States. Meanwhile, UK officials have called for Fifa to investigate the incident, asserting that politics should remain separate from football.
latest.full_brief: The White House has expressed support for Argentina's footballers who displayed a banner claiming the Falklands Islands after their World Cup semi-final victory. The banner read 'Las Malvinas son Argentinas,' reflecting Argentina's stance on the territorial dispute. Andrew Giuliani, head of the White House Fifa taskforce, emphasized the importance of free speech in the United States. Meanwhile, UK officials have called for Fifa to investigate the incident, asserting that politics should remain separate from football.

latest.title: Laos says it can't determine cause of tourist deaths linked to methanol
latest.summary: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US.
latest.details: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US. The Laos Ministry of Public Security stated that no autopsies were conducted on the bodies, which hindered their investigation. The distillery owner is facing charges for selling harmful food products, but these charges do not relate to the deaths.
latest.full_brief: Laos says it cannot determine blame or cause for the deaths of six deaths linked to methanol-tainted alcohol. The victims included citizens from the UK, Australia, Denmark, and the US. The Laos Ministry of Public Security stated that no autopsies were conducted on the bodies, which hindered their investigation. The distillery owner is facing charges for selling harmful food products, but these charges do not relate to the deaths.

brief_methodology.pl: Komentarz powstaje wyłącznie z przeczytanego tekstu artykułu. Musi przejść niezależny przegląd AI oraz pełną kontrolę językową; surowy tekst artykułu lub RSS nie może być komentarzem awaryjnym.
brief_methodology.en: A comment is created only from the retrieved article text. It must pass an independent AI review and the complete language gate; raw article or RSS text is never a fallback comment.

comment_quality_gate.pl: Publikowany jest wyłącznie komentarz utworzony z tekstu artykułu, zatwierdzony w niezależnym przeglądzie AI i przyjęty w całości przez rygorystyczną kontrolę językową. Jedno wadliwe zdanie odrzuca cały komentarz.
comment_quality_gate.en: Only an article-derived comment approved by an independent AI review and accepted in full by the strict language gate is published. One defective sentence rejects the whole comment.

same_story_dedupe.rule: One underlying event gets one homepage card, even if multiple publishers cover it with different links.
